plugins.name: forgebee
plugins.description: Batteries-included development and growth framework — 33 slash commands, 69 specialist agents (including 12 review sub-agents), 19 lifecycle hooks across 9 events, 3 skills, adversarial debate system, continuous learning with instinct-based pattern extraction, crash recovery checkpointing, governance audit trail, agent contract validation, Growth OS 9-phase marketing pipeline, evidence-based verification, TDD enforcement, and automated project management. Compatible with Claude Code and OpenClaw.
